title: Blue Period
sourceNotes: The 12-episode ONA adapts manga chapters 1-25 (volumes 1-6), ending with the Tokyo University of the Arts (Geidai) entrance-exam results in chapter 25 'No Regrets'. Pacing is a steady ~2 chapters/episode; the four section ranges are firm but the internal per-episode split points are approximations. Manga is ongoing (serialized in Monthly Afternoon); latest chapter approximately 87 with 19 volumes as of mid-2026. The only Blue Period film is a 2024 live-action movie, excluded here as it is not an anime adaptation.

mappings.arc: Yatora discovers art / decides to pursue Geidai
Prep school / cram school & mock exams
